author: nero_eth
content:
Continuing with my ACDC question.
Why would we want validators to download/propagate proofs assuming this would slow them down which could lead to them attesting late.
Why wouldn't it be enough to set everything up but make sure that no validators are using it (e.g. not recommending it to validators) and instead testing things on regular non-validating nodes?
My concern is that opting in could degrade a validator's performance, thus the networks health.
